title: The Adventures of Toto – Medium VSAQs

questions.question: Why did Grandfather buy Toto from the tonga-driver?
questions.answer: Because the monkey looked out of place and Grandfather wanted him for his private zoo.

questions.question: Why did Grandfather decide to keep Toto secretly at first?
questions.answer: Because Grandmother disliked new animals being brought home.

questions.question: What damage did Toto cause in the closet?
questions.answer: He tore the wallpaper and shredded the narrator’s blazer.

questions.question: Why was Toto moved to the servants’ quarters?
questions.answer: To keep him with the other pets in a cage.

questions.question: Why did Grandfather take Toto to Saharanpur?
questions.answer: Because he had to collect his pension there.

questions.question: Why was Toto kept in a canvas kit-bag?
questions.answer: To carry him safely during the train journey.

questions.question: Why did the ticket collector charge fare for Toto?
questions.answer: Because he classified Toto as a dog.

questions.question: How did Grandfather try to prove that Toto was not a dog?
questions.answer: By showing that Toto was a monkey.

questions.question: What did Grandfather show the ticket collector after Toto?
questions.answer: His pet tortoise.

questions.question: Why did the ticket collector not charge fare for the tortoise?
questions.answer: Because he said it was not a dog.

questions.question: Why did Nana try to pull away from the hay bundle?
questions.answer: Because Toto had bitten her ears.

questions.question: How did Toto behave while bathing?
questions.answer: He carefully tested the water and slowly stepped into it.

questions.question: Why would Toto stop bathing sometimes?
questions.answer: Because he felt hurt if someone laughed at him.

questions.question: Why did Toto get into the kettle?
questions.answer: Because the warm water looked suitable for a bath.

questions.question: Why did Toto keep jumping in the kettle?
questions.answer: Because the water was getting hotter.

questions.question: Why did Grandmother scream during lunch?
questions.answer: Because Toto was eating the pullao.

questions.question: How did Toto react when Grandmother screamed?
questions.answer: He threw a plate at her.

questions.question: Where did Toto run after taking the dish of pullao?
questions.answer: To the jackfruit tree.

questions.question: Why did Toto stay in the tree for a long time?
questions.answer: Because he wanted to finish all the rice.

questions.question: Why did Toto throw the dish from the tree?
questions.answer: To spite Grandmother.

questions.question: Why was Toto considered troublesome?
questions.answer: Because he destroyed things and created chaos.

questions.question: Why did the family decide not to keep Toto?
questions.answer: Because his mischief caused too much loss.

questions.question: What items were frequently destroyed by Toto?
questions.answer: Dishes, clothes, curtains, and wallpaper.

questions.question: Why could the family not afford Toto’s mischief?
questions.answer: Because they were not very wealthy.

questions.question: What kind of pet does Toto prove to be?
questions.answer: A mischievous and troublesome pet.
